untranslatable_reason: 52-week high is not available in allowed indicators. The signal requires tracking a 52-week lookback period (252 trading days) to identify the highest close, which cannot be expressed with the provided indicator set limited to recent technical indicators (5-200 period SMAs/EMAs, Donchian channels, etc.). A workaround using dc_upper was attempted but does not accurately capture the anchoring bias at the 52-week high specifically. Additional indicators needed: highest_close_252 or similar historical high tracker.
translation_notes: Signal fundamentally requires 52-week (252-day) highest close tracking, which is not available. Attempted substitute using Donchian upper band as price proximity anchor, but this does not reflect the behavioral anchoring at 52-week highs described in the source material. Consolidation duration (3 days) and momentum lookback (5 days) cannot be directly encoded in condition-based rules without temporal state tracking. For proper implementation, extend allowed indicators to include: highest_close_N_periods, bar_counter, days_in_zone trackers.
